title: jasione supina subsp. supina
intro: Jaside supina subsp. supina, also known as the bent or creeping bellflower, is a flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Jasione supina subsp. supina include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
